log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 22 damage. Vampire — Armored Tank HP: 37/59
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Vampire — Armored Tank HP: 18/59
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Vampire — Armored Tank HP: 6/59
--- Vampire — Armored Tank --- HP: 6/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vampire — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vampire — Armored Tank (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vampire — Armored Tank
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Vampire — Armored Tank HP: -9/59
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Vampire — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:7+4=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
